Package calendar.view

Class CalendarView

  • java.lang.Object
    • calendar.view.CalendarView
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    CalendarViewInterface
    public class CalendarView
extends java.lang.Object
implements CalendarViewInterface
    Represents the view component for the calendar application.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      CalendarView()
      Default constructor using System.out.
      CalendarView​(java.lang.Appendable output)
      Constructor with custom output destination.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void addFeatures​(Features feature)
      Register callback features with the view.
      void displayAvailableCalendars​(java.util.List<java.lang.String> calendarNames)
      Display a list of available calendars.
      void displayCurrentCalendar​(java.lang.String calendarName, java.lang.String timezone)
      Display the currently selected calendar information.
      void displayError​(java.lang.String error)
      Display an error message.
      void displayEventsBetween​(java.util.List<Event> events, java.time.LocalDateTime start, java.time.LocalDateTime end)
      Display events within a date-time range.
      void displayEventsOnDate​(java.util.List<Event> events, java.time.LocalDate date)
      Display events scheduled on a specific date.
      void displayMonthView​(int year, int month, java.util.Map<java.time.LocalDate,​java.util.List<Event>> events)
      Display a month view with events.
      void displaySuccess​(java.lang.String message)
      Display a success message.
      void displayUserStatus​(UserStatus status)
      Display the user's availability status.
      void displayWarning​(java.lang.String warning)
      Display a warning message.
      void displayWelcome()
      Display the welcome message when the application starts.
      void exportCalendar​(java.lang.String content, java.lang.String fileName)
      Export calendar data to a file.
      void makeVisible()
      Make the view visible (primarily for GUI).
      void refresh()
      Refresh the view with current data.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • CalendarView

        public CalendarView​(java.lang.Appendable output)
             throws java.lang.IllegalArgumentException
        Constructor with custom output destination.
        Parameters:
        output - the destination for all output
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the output destination is null

      • CalendarView

        public CalendarView()
        Default constructor using System.out.

    • Method Detail

      • displayMonthView

        public void displayMonthView​(int year,
                             int month,
                             java.util.Map<java.time.LocalDate,​java.util.List<Event>> events)
        Description copied from interface: CalendarViewInterface
        Display a month view with events. This is primarily for GUI implementation.
        Specified by:
        displayMonthView in interface CalendarViewInterface
        Parameters:
        year - the year to display
        month - the month to display (1-12)
        events - a map of dates to lists of events on those dates

      • displayCurrentCalendar

        public void displayCurrentCalendar​(java.lang.String calendarName,
                                   java.lang.String timezone)
        Description copied from interface: CalendarViewInterface
        Display the currently selected calendar information.
        Specified by:
        displayCurrentCalendar in interface CalendarViewInterface
        Parameters:
        calendarName - the name of the current calendar
        timezone - the timezone of the current calendar

      • displayAvailableCalendars

        public void displayAvailableCalendars​(java.util.List<java.lang.String> calendarNames)
        Description copied from interface: CalendarViewInterface
        Display a list of available calendars.
        Specified by:
        displayAvailableCalendars in interface CalendarViewInterface
        Parameters:
        calendarNames - the list of calendar names

      • displayEventsOnDate

        public void displayEventsOnDate​(java.util.List<Event> events,
                                java.time.LocalDate date)
        Description copied from interface: CalendarViewInterface
        Display events scheduled on a specific date.
        Specified by:
        displayEventsOnDate in interface CalendarViewInterface
        Parameters:
        events - the list of events on the given date
        date - the date to display events for

      • displayEventsBetween

        public void displayEventsBetween​(java.util.List<Event> events,
                                 java.time.LocalDateTime start,
                                 java.time.LocalDateTime end)
        Description copied from interface: CalendarViewInterface
        Display events within a date-time range.
        Specified by:
        displayEventsBetween in interface CalendarViewInterface
        Parameters:
        events - the list of events within the range
        start - the start date-time of the range
        end - the end date-time of the range

      • displayUserStatus

        public void displayUserStatus​(UserStatus status)
        Description copied from interface: CalendarViewInterface
        Display the user's availability status.
        Specified by:
        displayUserStatus in interface CalendarViewInterface
        Parameters:
        status - the user status (BUSY or AVAILABLE)

      • exportCalendar

        public void exportCalendar​(java.lang.String content,
                           java.lang.String fileName)
        Description copied from interface: CalendarViewInterface
        Export calendar data to a file.
        Specified by:
        exportCalendar in interface CalendarViewInterface
        Parameters:
        content - the content to export (CSV or iCal formatted)
        fileName - the destination file name
